coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:09 at 80%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 7:09 at 80%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 2 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/2. Target: 110% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: After this recovery, you have 20min at 105%. One interval at a time. Focus here first.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/2. 110% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/2. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 20:00 at 105%. Then 3min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last block. 95-105% FTP, 75-85 rpm. After this: 3min cooldown.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 20:00 at 105%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final block! 20:00 at 105%. The light at the end of the tunnel. It's probably more threshold work.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 105% FTP, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 37 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 90% into session. 60%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
